pr.title: Record: SwiGLU + MLP 3x + Int6 + LoRA TTT, val_bpb=1.1670 (8xH100)

output.summary: Combines wider SwiGLU MLP, int6+QAT quant, and LoRA-based test-time training on a 10-layer transformer to squeeze more capacity under the artifact cap.
techniques: 3x SwiGLU MLP expansion + extra layer for more capacity
Int6 quantization with QAT and zstd packing to fit model in cap
LoRA test-time training updates per-document during eval
